/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Toolchains/XcodeDefault.xctoolchain/usr/bin/c++  -g -isysroot /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX10.15.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names  CMakeFiles/define_usage.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/define_usage.dir/thread.cpp.o CMakeFiles/define_usage.dir/HTraceStart.cpp.o  -o define_usage
